calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-10-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendants KIMBERLY DRURY, AN INDIVIDUAL; AND LUKE K. LIGHTNING, AN INDIVIDUAL,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $40,153.43
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00 (waived)
Costs: $568.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $40,721.43

Judgment signed in open court.
